title: DIY Faux Leather Bench
summary: Create this fun Leather Woven Bench to bring some style to your home.
description: Create this fun Leather Woven Bench to bring some style to your home.

steps.title: Assemble Base Side
steps.body: Begin assembling the base by attaching the (48 1/4") 2x2s to the (13 1/2") 2x2s using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" pocket hole screws to attach along with wood glue.

steps.title: Add Base Side Stretchers
steps.body: Attach the two middle (13 1/2") 2x2 to the assembled side using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" pocket hole screws to attach along with wood glue and repeat both steps to create two bench base sides.

steps.title: Attach Base Sides
steps.body: Attach the two assembled base sides together with the four remaining (13 1/2") 2x2s using a Kreg Jig on a 1 1/2" setting, with 2 1/2" pocket hole screws to attach along with wood glue.

steps.title: Attach Leather Top
steps.body:
*Check out the link in the Extras tab for leather top upholstery instructions and video*
Attach Leather top of your choice to the assembled base using 2" Wood Screws.
